name: clawville-backend
description: Initial backend skeleton for ClawVille AI Agent Office System

scripts.test:ci: node --import tsx --test tests/api-behavior-unchanged.test.ts tests/persistence.test.ts tests/runtime-source.contract.test.ts tests/runtime-source-selection.test.ts tests/openclaw-runtime.integration.test.ts tests/shared-contracts.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:ci
scripts.check:full: npm run typecheck && npm run test
